title: Use indexes
excerpt: description: Improve D1 query performance by creating indexes on frequently queried columns. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Indexes enable D1 to improve query performance over the indexed columns for common (popular) queries by reducing the amount of data (number of rows) the database has to scan when running a query.…
